title: Simple Nether Star Items
description: Simply adds nether star armors and tools. Not too overpowered.
body:
# Simple Nether Star Items
a simple mod that adds nether star armors and tools.
## Items
- **Nether Star Armors** ... Provides same armor points as diamond/netherite armors. Also provides 5 armor toughness and 2 knockback resistance, both better than netherite.
- **Nether Star Tools** ... Has 4000 durability points, mines blocks in 20 speed(the pickaxe can insta-mine stones when enchanted with Efficiency V, without using Haste effect), deals 2 more damage than netherite tools
- **Nether Star Upgrade Smithing Template** ... A smithing template used to craft nether star armors and tools. Crafted with a netherite upgrade smithing template and an enchanted golden apple.
